major_arcana.name: The Fool

upright.general: A new journey begins. You are standing at a threshold, full of potential and unburdened by past experience. Embrace the unknown with an open heart.
upright.love: A fresh romantic chapter, playful energy, or meeting someone unexpected. Don't overthink — let things unfold naturally.
upright.career: A bold new career move, starting a business, or taking a risk that others might call reckless. Trust your instincts.
upright.finance: You may be taking a financial leap. Excitement is high but caution is needed. Balance spontaneity with basic planning.
upright.health: Renewed vitality and optimism. Good time to try new wellness routines or adventures.

reversed.general: Recklessness, poor planning, or fear of starting. You may be holding back from a needed change, or leaping without any thought.
reversed.love: Naivety in love, being taken advantage of, or fear of commitment and vulnerability.
reversed.career: Hasty decisions, lack of direction, or refusing to grow beyond comfort zones.
reversed.finance: Careless spending, risky gambles without research, financial immaturity.
reversed.health: Ignoring warning signs, reckless behavior affecting wellbeing.

major_arcana.symbolism: The Fool walks toward a cliff, carefree, with a small pack of belongings and a white rose symbolizing purity. A dog nips at his heels — the voice of practical reason.
major_arcana.archetype: The eternal beginner, the divine child

major_arcana.name: The Magician

upright.general: You have all the tools you need. This is a time of great personal power — channel your focus and turn intention into reality.
upright.love: You have the magnetism and charm to attract what you want. Be intentional about what kind of love you invite.
upright.career: Mastery, skill, and the ability to make things happen. A promotion, new project, or recognition of your talents.
upright.finance: Smart financial moves are possible. You have the skill — use it. Good time for investment with research.
upright.health: Strong mind-body connection. Mental focus aids physical recovery and vitality.

reversed.general: Manipulation, trickery, or wasted potential. Your skills may be misdirected or someone around you is being deceptive.
reversed.love: Manipulation or illusion in a relationship. Someone may not be who they appear to be.
reversed.career: Cunning used for ill, or feeling unable to apply your talents effectively.
reversed.finance: Financial deception — either from others or your own wishful thinking.
reversed.health: Psychosomatic issues, or using energy in destructive patterns.

major_arcana.symbolism: The Magician stands with one arm raised to the sky, one pointing to earth — 'As above, so below.' On his table: a cup, sword, wand, and pentacle, representing all four elements.
major_arcana.archetype: The alchemist, the transformer

major_arcana.name: The High Priestess

upright.general: Answers lie within. Trust your gut over logical analysis. Something hidden will be revealed in time — wait and listen.
upright.love: Deep emotional bonds, psychic connection, or a relationship that needs time to reveal itself. Don't rush.
upright.career: Hidden information, behind-the-scenes dynamics. Research thoroughly before acting. Intuition over impulse.
upright.finance: Not everything is visible. Look deeper before committing. There may be hidden costs or opportunities.
upright.health: Listen to your body's quiet signals. Intuitive healing, rest, and inner work are favored.

reversed.general: Ignoring intuition, information withheld, or secrets surfacing. You may be out of touch with your inner self.
reversed.love: Hidden feelings, repression, or lack of emotional honesty.
reversed.career: Information asymmetry — someone knows more than they're sharing.
reversed.finance: Hidden debts or denial about financial realities.
reversed.health: Suppressed emotional pain manifesting physically. Time to look inward.

major_arcana.symbolism: She sits between two pillars (B and J — Boaz and Jachin) before a veil of pomegranates. A crescent moon at her feet, the Torah in her lap — she guards the threshold between worlds.
major_arcana.archetype: The oracle, the inner wise woman

major_arcana.name: The Empress

upright.general: A time of growth, abundance, and creative flourishing. Nature supports you. Nurture what you've planted.
upright.love: Deep sensual connection, a relationship blossoming, pregnancy, or unconditional love and care.
upright.career: Creative projects thrive. A nurturing work environment or leadership through care and abundance.
upright.finance: Abundance is flowing. Financial growth, especially from creative or nature-based work.
upright.health: Vitality, fertility, and physical wellbeing. Connect with nature. Honor your body.

reversed.general: Creative blocks, dependence, or neglect of self-care. Over-giving or smothering others.
reversed.love: Co-dependence, jealousy, or neglecting your own needs in a relationship.
reversed.career: Creative stagnation or a toxic nurturing dynamic at work.
reversed.finance: Overspending on comfort, or difficulty receiving abundance.
reversed.health: Neglecting the body, issues around fertility or feminine health.

major_arcana.symbolism: A crowned figure sits in a lush garden, surrounded by wheat and a heart-shaped shield with the Venus symbol. She embodies Earth's generative power.
major_arcana.archetype: The Great Mother, the creator

major_arcana.name: The Emperor

upright.general: Establish order and take command. Structure leads to success now. Strong foundations, clear rules, decisive action.
upright.love: A stable, committed partner. Security and loyalty in love, though warmth may need cultivating.
upright.career: Leadership, authority, and organizational success. A promotion or taking charge of a situation.
upright.finance: Disciplined approach pays off. Build wealth through structure and long-term planning.
upright.health: Disciplined health routines. Address issues through structure and consistency.

reversed.general: Tyranny, rigidity, or abuse of power. An authority figure may be overbearing, or you may be too controlling.
reversed.love: Domination, inflexibility, or emotional coldness in a relationship.
reversed.career: Power struggles, authoritarian leadership, or rebellion against structure.
reversed.finance: Financial rigidity or control issues around money.
reversed.health: Stress from control issues, or ignoring doctor's advice out of stubbornness.

major_arcana.symbolism: The Emperor sits on a stone throne adorned with rams' heads, wearing armor beneath his robes. The arid mountains behind him show his dominion over nature.
major_arcana.archetype: The king, the father, the ruler

major_arcana.name: The Hierophant

upright.general: Seek wisdom from established traditions, mentors, or institutions. There is value in structure and shared beliefs.
upright.love: Traditional relationships, commitment, marriage, or shared spiritual values. Meeting a partner through conventional means.
upright.career: Following established paths, working within institutions, mentorship, or pursuing formal education.
upright.finance: Conservative financial approaches. Seek advice from established experts.
upright.health: Follow conventional medical advice. Trust established health systems.

reversed.general: Rebellion against tradition, dogma, or institutional corruption. Breaking free from convention — or being trapped by it.
reversed.love: Unconventional relationships, or feeling constrained by social expectations around love.
reversed.career: Challenging the status quo, leaving a traditional career path, or issues with authority.
reversed.finance: Unconventional approaches to money — may be liberating or reckless.
reversed.health: Exploring alternative medicine or rebelling against medical advice.

major_arcana.symbolism: A religious figure in elaborate vestments sits between two pillars, blessing two followers. He holds a triple scepter and wears a triple crown — the bridge between heaven and earth.
major_arcana.archetype: The teacher, the priest, the tradition-keeper

major_arcana.name: The Lovers

upright.general: A significant choice must be made — align your decision with your deepest values. Union and harmony are possible.
upright.love: A deep, soulful connection. Mutual love, partnership, or a meaningful relationship milestone.
upright.career: A major career choice. Align your work with your values. Partnerships and collaborations are favored.
upright.finance: Financial decisions require careful value-alignment. Joint finances may be relevant.
upright.health: Mind-body-spirit alignment. Choices affecting long-term health require careful consideration.

reversed.general: Misalignment of values, indecision, or a relationship out of harmony. Fear of commitment or bad choices.
reversed.love: Relationship imbalance, infidelity, or a difficult choice between partners or paths.
reversed.career: Compromising your values at work, or a difficult career decision with no clear answer.
reversed.finance: Poor financial decisions due to emotional reasoning or conflicting priorities.
reversed.health: Internal conflict affecting physical health. Mind and body not working together.

major_arcana.symbolism: A man and woman stand naked beneath an angel who blesses them. Behind the woman is the Tree of Knowledge; behind the man, the Tree of Life. The volcano in the background represents passion.
major_arcana.archetype: The soul mate, the integration of opposites

major_arcana.name: The Chariot

upright.general: Push forward with confidence. Victory is within reach through focused willpower and disciplined action. Don't let opposing forces derail you.
upright.love: Pursuing love with determination. A relationship that requires effort but is worth it. Moving forward after obstacles.
upright.career: Ambitious drive leads to success. Overcome challenges through sheer will. Promotions, competitive wins.
upright.finance: Financial goals achieved through disciplined effort. Keep pushing toward your targets.
upright.health: Recovery through determination. Physical training and competitive sports are favored.

reversed.general: Loss of control, aggression, or scattered focus. You may be forcing outcomes that need a different approach.
reversed.love: Controlling behavior, forcing a relationship that isn't working, or lack of direction.
reversed.career: Burnout, losing battles, or aggression in the workplace.
reversed.finance: Reckless financial ambition. Check if you're chasing the wrong goals.
reversed.health: Overexertion, aggression-related injuries, or forcing recovery too quickly.

major_arcana.symbolism: A warrior rides a chariot pulled by two sphinxes — one black, one white — representing opposing forces brought under control. He wears a canopy of stars, ruling over both heaven and earth.
major_arcana.archetype: The warrior, the achiever

major_arcana.name: Strength

upright.general: True strength comes from within — from love, patience, and compassion, not force. You have what it takes to face what lies ahead.
upright.love: Relationships built on deep understanding and patience. Compassionate love that endures difficulties.
upright.career: Overcoming challenges with grace. Leadership through emotional intelligence rather than authority.
upright.finance: Patient, long-term approach to finances. Slow and steady wins the race.
upright.health: Inner resilience in recovery. Mind over matter — positive attitude significantly impacts health.

reversed.general: Self-doubt, weakness, or losing your temper. You may be relying on force where gentleness is needed, or vice versa.
reversed.love: Emotional insecurity or aggression in a relationship. Fear of vulnerability.
reversed.career: Lack of confidence undermining performance, or brute force creating enemies.
reversed.finance: Impatient financial decisions, or fear preventing necessary financial risks.
reversed.health: Low willpower affecting health goals. Emotional issues manifesting physically.

major_arcana.symbolism: A woman gently closes the mouth of a lion with her bare hands. Above her head floats an infinity symbol. She tames the beast through love, not force.
major_arcana.archetype: The gentle warrior, the inner lion-tamer

major_arcana.name: The Hermit

upright.general: Retreat inward. A period of solitude and reflection will bring the answers you seek. Your inner light guides you through the dark.
upright.love: A need for space and introspection before committing. A solitary period, or a mentor-like romantic figure.
upright.career: Working alone or in deep focus. A period of study, research, or consultation with a wise mentor.
upright.finance: Careful, deliberate financial planning. Seek wise counsel before making big moves.
upright.health: Rest and recuperation. Mindfulness, meditation, and spiritual healing are favored.

reversed.general: Isolation becoming loneliness, or refusing necessary solitude. You may be hiding from the world or from yourself.
reversed.love: Excessive isolation damaging a relationship, or someone too withdrawn to connect emotionally.
reversed.career: Working in a silo, poor team communication, or missing opportunities due to isolation.
reversed.finance: Financial decisions made in isolation without good advice.
reversed.health: Social isolation affecting mental health. Don't let self-care become self-neglect.

major_arcana.symbolism: An old man stands alone on a snowy mountain peak, holding a lantern containing a six-pointed star. He is the seeker who has climbed to the heights of wisdom.
major_arcana.archetype: The sage, the seeker, the wise elder

major_arcana.name: Wheel of Fortune

upright.general: A significant turning point is approaching. Life's cycles are turning in your favor. Embrace change and trust in fate's larger plan.
upright.love: A fateful meeting, a relationship reaching a new phase, or a sudden positive shift in romantic life.
upright.career: A lucky break, unexpected opportunity, or a turning point in your career trajectory.
upright.finance: Financial winds are shifting — possibly for the better. Be ready to act on opportunities.
upright.health: Improvement on the horizon. A turning point in a health situation.

reversed.general: Bad luck, resistance to change, or being caught in a negative cycle. Fighting the inevitable.
reversed.love: A relationship going in circles, or bad timing affecting love.
reversed.career: Missed opportunities, or being at the wrong place at the wrong time.
reversed.finance: Financial downturn or instability. The wheel turns down — plan accordingly.
reversed.health: A setback in recovery. External factors affecting health.

major_arcana.symbolism: A great wheel turns in the sky, with mystical creatures at each corner. The sphinx at the top holds a sword; Anubis descends. The wheel of karma always turns.
major_arcana.archetype: The wheel of karma, fate, the cycle of life

major_arcana.name: Justice

upright.general: Truth will prevail. Actions have consequences — karmic balance is at work. Legal matters, fairness, and ethical decision-making are themes.
upright.love: A relationship built on honesty and mutual respect. Fair treatment of each other. Legal union or separation.
upright.career: Fairness in the workplace, legal contracts, or getting what you've earned. Ethical conduct is required.
upright.finance: Financial fairness — debts settled, taxes, or legal financial matters. You reap what you sow.
upright.health: Lifestyle choices directly affecting health. Take responsibility for your wellbeing.

reversed.general: Injustice, dishonesty, or avoiding accountability. Legal troubles or an unfair outcome.
reversed.love: Unfairness or dishonesty in a relationship. Someone is not taking responsibility.
reversed.career: Workplace injustice, corruption, or legal problems affecting work.
reversed.finance: Financial dishonesty, tax issues, or unfair financial treatment.
reversed.health: Ignoring the consequences of unhealthy habits.

major_arcana.symbolism: A figure sits between two pillars holding a sword in one hand and balanced scales in the other. The scales represent impartiality; the sword, decisive truth.
major_arcana.archetype: The judge, the karmic force

major_arcana.name: The Hanged Man

upright.general: Voluntary surrender opens new insight. What looks like a setback may be a profound shift in perspective. Let go — and see what is revealed.
upright.love: A relationship on pause, or the need to release old patterns to find real love. Surrender to what is.
upright.career: A waiting period, a project on hold, or the need to see your work from a completely different angle.
upright.finance: Financial sacrifice now for greater gain later. An investment that requires patience.
upright.health: Rest and surrender are healing. Stop fighting and allow recovery to happen.

reversed.general: Resistance to necessary change, feeling stuck, or martyrdom. Sacrifice without purpose.
reversed.love: Feeling stuck in a relationship, or sacrificing too much without reciprocation.
reversed.career: Stagnation, indecision, or refusing to let go of an outdated approach.
reversed.finance: Financial stagnation or poor investments that drain resources.
reversed.health: Refusing necessary rest, or feeling trapped in a health situation.

major_arcana.symbolism: A man hangs upside down from a living tree by one ankle, his face peaceful, his hair forming a halo. He chose this position — surrender as enlightenment.
major_arcana.archetype: The willing sacrifice, the mystic

major_arcana.name: Death

upright.general: An era ends so a new one can begin. This is not physical death but radical transformation. Release what no longer serves you.
upright.love: The end of a relationship phase, or a profound transformation of an existing bond. Something must end for something better to emerge.
upright.career: A major career change, end of a job, or complete professional reinvention. Necessary endings.
upright.finance: Financial transformation — an old pattern ending, debt cleared, or a complete change in financial life.
upright.health: Recovery from a serious illness, or the need to completely change health habits.

reversed.general: Resistance to change, stagnation, or fear of endings. Clinging to the past at great personal cost.
reversed.love: Refusing to end a relationship that has run its course. Fear of change keeping you stuck.
reversed.career: Inability to move on from a dead-end job, or fear of professional reinvention.
reversed.finance: Prolonging financial patterns that no longer work. Refusing to let old financial identities die.
reversed.health: Fearing necessary medical procedures, or refusing lifestyle changes needed for health.

major_arcana.symbolism: A skeleton knight rides a white horse across a landscape of the dead and dying. A bishop prays, a child offers flowers. In the background, the sun rises between two towers — death and renewal are one.
major_arcana.archetype: The transformer, the inevitable change

major_arcana.name: Temperance

upright.general: Find the middle way. Patient, measured action blending opposites creates something greater than either alone. Purpose and flow align.
upright.love: A harmonious, balanced relationship. Patience and moderation creating lasting love. Healing after past hurts.
upright.career: Long-term vision over short-term gains. Collaboration, teamwork, and patient progress toward meaningful goals.
upright.finance: Moderate and balanced financial approach. Slow, steady growth. Avoid extremes.
upright.health: Balance in all areas of health. Moderate exercise, balanced diet, emotional equanimity.

reversed.general: Imbalance, excess, or lack of purpose. Things feel off — extremes are causing harm.
reversed.love: Relationship imbalance, or trying to force harmony where there is fundamental incompatibility.
reversed.career: Extremes causing burnout, or lack of clear purpose affecting professional life.
reversed.finance: Financial excess — spending or saving to unhealthy extremes.
reversed.health: Extremes in diet, exercise, or lifestyle causing health problems.

major_arcana.symbolism: An angel stands with one foot on land and one in water, pouring liquid between two cups. The triangle in a square on their robe represents the physical within the spiritual.
major_arcana.archetype: The alchemist, the bridge between worlds

major_arcana.name: The Devil

upright.general: You may be bound by material attachments, addictions, or negative patterns. The chains are loosely attached — awareness is the first step to freedom.
upright.love: A toxic or codependent relationship, lust over love, or feeling trapped. Examine what you're really attached to.
upright.career: A job that feels like a trap, materialism over meaning, or unethical work environment.
upright.finance: Debt, financial bondage, or unhealthy relationship with money and materialism.
upright.health: Addiction, obsession, or unhealthy habits. The body and mind need liberation.

reversed.general: Breaking free from chains, releasing addictions, or confronting your shadow self. Liberation is possible.
reversed.love: Leaving a toxic relationship, or breaking codependent patterns.
reversed.career: Escaping a bad work situation, or breaking free from materialistic career goals.
reversed.finance: Breaking free from debt cycles or financial addictions.
reversed.health: Recovery from addiction. Shadow work supporting physical health.

major_arcana.symbolism: A horned demon sits enthroned above a man and woman chained to his pedestal — but the chains are loose, worn freely. The inverted pentagram signals perverted earthly power.
major_arcana.archetype: The shadow, the trickster, the inner demon

major_arcana.name: The Tower

upright.general: A sudden, shocking disruption shatters false structures. What falls had to fall. From the rubble, more authentic foundations can be built.
upright.love: A sudden relationship crisis, revelation, or breakup that was ultimately necessary. Shocking truth exposed.
upright.career: Sudden job loss, organizational upheaval, or a dramatic industry disruption.
upright.finance: Financial shock — unexpected loss, market crash, or sudden revelation about money.
upright.health: A sudden health crisis or diagnosis. Also: sudden breakthrough in recovery.

reversed.general: Avoiding necessary upheaval, or prolonged instability. A disaster averted or a crisis delayed — but not forever.
reversed.love: Avoiding a necessary breakup, or ongoing low-level relationship chaos.
reversed.career: Workplace instability prolonged, or fear of necessary change.
reversed.finance: Ongoing financial instability, or narrowly avoiding a financial crisis.
reversed.health: Chronic stress from avoiding necessary change in lifestyle.

major_arcana.symbolism: Lightning strikes a tower on a rocky mountain. The crown flies off. Two figures fall from the windows. The storm of truth destroys what was built on false foundations.
major_arcana.archetype: The lightning bolt of truth, the necessary destruction

major_arcana.name: The Star

upright.general: After the storm, light returns. Hope is renewed. Trust that you are being guided and that healing is underway. The universe supports you.
upright.love: Hope and healing in love. A beautiful, soul-nourishing relationship or the hope of one coming. Serenity after heartbreak.
upright.career: Inspiration, renewed purpose, and recognition. Your work is aligned with your calling.
upright.finance: Financial hope renewed. Light at the end of a difficult tunnel. Generosity flows both ways.
upright.health: Healing is underway. A hopeful health prognosis. Spiritual healing supports physical recovery.

reversed.general: Loss of hope, despair, or disconnection from faith. The stars feel hidden — but they are still there.
reversed.love: Hopelessness about love, or feeling disconnected from a partner's light.
reversed.career: Loss of professional inspiration or feeling unseen in your work.
reversed.finance: Financial despair. Hard to see a path forward — but one exists.
reversed.health: Discouragement about health. Maintain hope — healing takes time.

major_arcana.symbolism: A naked woman kneels by a pool, pouring water from two jugs — one into the pool, one onto the land. Eight stars fill the sky. Vulnerability and healing as acts of faith.
major_arcana.archetype: The healer, the hope-bringer

major_arcana.name: The Moon

upright.general: Not everything is as it appears. Your imagination, fears, and the unconscious are very active now. Navigate carefully through uncertainty.
upright.love: Confusion or illusion in a relationship. Hidden feelings, unresolved fears, or a connection with deep emotional complexity.
upright.career: Unclear situation at work, hidden agendas, or creative work fueled by the unconscious.
upright.finance: Financial confusion or deception. Get clarity before acting — things may not be as they seem.
upright.health: Mental health challenges, sleep issues, or health symptoms that are hard to diagnose.

reversed.general: Confusion lifting, fears being released, or illusions dissolving. What was hidden comes to light.
reversed.love: Truth emerging in a relationship, confusion resolved, or facing relationship fears.
reversed.career: A murky work situation becoming clearer. Hidden information surfaces.
reversed.finance: Financial clarity after confusion. A deception is uncovered.
reversed.health: Mental clarity returning, or finally getting an accurate diagnosis.

major_arcana.symbolism: The moon shines over a pool. A crayfish climbs from the water. A dog and wolf howl at the moon. Two towers mark the path into the unknown unconscious wilderness.
major_arcana.archetype: The dreamer, the unconscious mind

major_arcana.name: The Sun

upright.general: Pure, unambiguous joy and success. You are in a golden period — things are clear, bright, and full of life. Celebrate.
upright.love: A joyful, life-affirming relationship. New romance, celebration of love, or a relationship radiating warmth and happiness.
upright.career: Success, recognition, and achievement. Your work shines. Promotions, accolades, or starting something with real momentum.
upright.finance: Financial success and abundance. Generous returns on investments. Bright financial outlook.
upright.health: Radiant health and vitality. Full recovery, or simply feeling wonderfully alive.

reversed.general: Temporary setbacks to joy, or an inability to access your own inner light. The sun is still there — clouds are passing.
reversed.love: Relationship difficulties dimming joy, or ego and pride creating distance.
reversed.career: Overconfidence, or success blocked by temporary obstacles.
reversed.finance: Overspending during good times, or delays in financial success.
reversed.health: A temporary dip in vitality. Self-care needed to restore natural radiance.

major_arcana.symbolism: A child rides a white horse under a blazing sun, arms wide open, a red banner flowing. Sunflowers bloom behind a stone wall. Pure, unguarded joy and life.
major_arcana.archetype: The divine child, the life force

major_arcana.name: Judgement

upright.general: A profound awakening and calling. It is time to answer a deeper summons — to rise, to be renewed, to fully step into who you are meant to be.
upright.love: A profound renewal in a relationship, or a calling to make a major relationship decision. Honest reckoning with past relationship patterns.
upright.career: A calling to meaningful work, or a major professional decision after deep reflection.
upright.finance: Financial reckoning — reviewing past decisions and making new commitments for the future.
upright.health: A wake-up call about health, or a profound healing and renewal.

reversed.general: Self-doubt, refusing the call, or harsh self-judgment blocking growth. You are harder on yourself than any external judge.
reversed.love: Refusing to let go of past relationship wounds, or excessive self-blame.
reversed.career: Ignoring a professional calling, or harsh self-criticism undermining confidence.
reversed.finance: Regret over past financial mistakes blocking present action.
reversed.health: Harsh self-judgment affecting health. Stop punishing yourself — heal instead.

major_arcana.symbolism: An angel blows a trumpet from the clouds. The dead rise from coffins, arms outstretched. Mountain peaks surround all. The final awakening — not death, but resurrection.
major_arcana.archetype: The awakener, the final call

major_arcana.name: The World

upright.general: A great cycle completes. You have achieved something significant and are now whole. Celebrate — and prepare to begin again at a higher level.
upright.love: A relationship reaching its highest potential, or a sense of complete love and mutual fulfillment.
upright.career: Major career milestone achieved. A project completed, a goal realized. Recognition and success.
upright.finance: Financial goals achieved. A sense of abundance and completion. Everything in its right place.
upright.health: Full recovery and wholeness. A sense of complete physical and mental wellbeing.

reversed.general: Incompletion, shortcuts, or not fully integrating lessons. Something is preventing the natural completion of a cycle.
reversed.love: A relationship stuck before reaching its full potential, or fear of committing to love.
reversed.career: Almost there but not quite — a project unfinished or goal just out of reach.
reversed.finance: Financial goals not quite realized, or feeling like abundance is always slightly out of reach.
reversed.health: Recovery incomplete. Something still unresolved preventing full health.

major_arcana.symbolism: A dancing figure is wrapped in a purple sash, holding two wands. An oval wreath surrounds her. The four figures at the corners mirror The Wheel of Fortune — the great cycle complete.
major_arcana.archetype: The integrated whole, the dancing universe

wands.suit_theme: passion, creativity, ambition, career, fire energy, inspiration

upright.general: A burst of creative energy and inspiration. A new project, idea, or passion is igniting. Seize this spark before it fades.
upright.love: Exciting new romantic beginning. Passion and chemistry. A relationship full of fire and life.
upright.career: A new creative project, business idea, or career opportunity full of potential.
upright.finance: A new financial opportunity or venture with exciting potential.
upright.health: Surge of vitality and energy. Excellent time to start a new fitness or wellness regimen.

reversed.general: Creative blocks, false starts, or lost enthusiasm. The spark is there but won't catch — examine why.
reversed.love: Lack of excitement in romance, or a relationship losing its spark.
reversed.career: Delayed projects, creative blocks, or a new venture failing to launch.
reversed.finance: A financial opportunity not materializing as hoped.
reversed.health: Low energy or motivation to begin new health habits.

upright.general: You are planning your next move from a position of strength. The world is open to you — decide where to go next.
upright.love: Deciding on the direction of a relationship. Long-distance romance or someone planning a future together.
upright.career: Strategic planning, considering expansion, or deciding between career opportunities.
upright.finance: Planning financial growth. Considering investments or business expansion.
upright.health: Planning a long-term health journey. Setting goals for the future.

reversed.general: Lack of planning, fear of the unknown, or restlessness without direction.
reversed.love: Indecision about a relationship's future, or fear of commitment.
reversed.career: Poor planning, or being stuck in a comfort zone without growing.
reversed.finance: Lack of financial planning or fear of investment.
reversed.health: Lack of long-term health planning or consistency.

upright.general: Your plans are in motion and the first results are visible. Look ahead — expansion and growth are on the horizon.
upright.love: A relationship growing and expanding. Long-distance connections, or someone returning from afar.
upright.career: Business expansion, international opportunities, or seeing early results of your hard work.
upright.finance: Financial expansion. Overseas investments or enterprises showing positive results.
upright.health: Progress in health goals becoming visible. Keep going.

reversed.general: Delays, obstacles to expansion, or plans not materializing as expected.
reversed.love: Long-distance relationship difficulties or delays in relationship progress.
reversed.career: Plans not going as hoped, obstacles to expansion.
reversed.finance: Financial delays or failed expansion plans.
reversed.health: Slower than expected progress in health goals.

upright.general: A time of celebration, community joy, and stable foundation. A milestone worth celebrating with those you love.
upright.love: Celebration in love — engagement, wedding, anniversary, or a relationship milestone. Joyful partnership.
upright.career: Team celebration, project completion milestone, or a positive company event.
upright.finance: Financial stability worth celebrating. A savings goal reached or financial security established.
upright.health: Celebrating health milestones. Community support enhancing wellbeing.

reversed.general: Delayed celebrations, family tension, or a sense of incompletion around a milestone.
reversed.love: Relationship instability, cancelled celebrations, or tension at home.
reversed.career: Delayed recognition, team conflict, or a problematic work environment.
reversed.finance: Unstable financial foundation or delayed financial milestones.
reversed.health: Health-related celebrations premature, or home environment affecting health.

upright.general: Conflict and competition abound. Multiple forces pulling in different directions. Energy is high — channel it productively.
upright.love: Conflicts or competition in romance. Arguments, jealousy, or fighting for someone's attention.
upright.career: Fierce competition, workplace conflicts, or creative tension between team members.
upright.finance: Financial competition or conflict. Multiple financial pressures pulling at resources.
upright.health: High stress from conflict affecting health. Channel tension into exercise.

reversed.general: Conflict avoided or resolved. Alternatively, suppressed tension that needs addressing.
reversed.love: Resolution of relationship conflict, or avoiding necessary confrontation.
reversed.career: Workplace peace restored, or avoiding necessary competitive situations.
reversed.finance: Financial conflicts resolved, or avoidance of necessary financial confrontation.
reversed.health: Stress reducing, or avoiding health-related confrontations.

upright.general: Victory is yours and the world knows it. Public recognition and acclaim for your achievements. Ride this wave of success.
upright.love: A confident, successful relationship. Being proud of your partner or vice versa. Public declaration of love.
upright.career: Public recognition, promotion, or a notable professional win celebrated by others.
upright.finance: Financial success and recognition. Your wise financial decisions are paying off visibly.
upright.health: A notable health achievement. Recognition for fitness goals or health transformation.

reversed.general: Delayed success, private victory without recognition, or ego inflation from success.
reversed.love: Relationship struggles despite outward appearances, or pride creating distance.
reversed.career: Recognition delayed or stolen. Arrogance following success.
reversed.finance: Financial success not materializing as hoped, or mismanaging a financial win.
reversed.health: Health improvements going unrecognized, or overconfidence leading to setbacks.

upright.general: You are under pressure from many sides — but your position is defensible. Stand your ground with courage and conviction.
upright.love: Fighting for a relationship or defending your partnership against outside pressure.
upright.career: Defending your position, ideas, or achievements against competition or criticism.
upright.finance: Protecting financial gains from threats. Standing firm in financial negotiations.
upright.health: Fighting through a health challenge. Maintaining discipline against temptation.

reversed.general: Giving up, feeling overwhelmed, or being paralyzed by competition.
reversed.love: Giving up on a relationship under pressure, or exhaustion from relationship conflict.
reversed.career: Capitulating to workplace pressure, or losing your position.
reversed.finance: Financial defeat or surrendering financial position.
reversed.health: Health challenges overwhelming willpower.

upright.general: Things are moving fast. Act quickly — opportunities don't wait. Communication flows, travel beckons, and momentum is everything now.
upright.love: Whirlwind romance, things moving fast in a relationship, or a long-distance relationship.
upright.career: Projects accelerating, fast-moving opportunities, or a surge of communication and activity.
upright.finance: Fast financial movements. Act quickly on opportunities. Investments gaining momentum.
upright.health: Quick recovery or rapid improvement. Keep up the momentum.

reversed.general: Delays, miscommunication, or scattered energy. Things that should be moving are stuck.

reversed.career: Projects stalled, communication breakdowns, or missed opportunities.
reversed.finance: Financial delays or missed fast-moving opportunities.
reversed.health: Slower than expected recovery. Scattered energy undermining health goals.

upright.general: You are battle-worn but not beaten. Gather your remaining strength — you are closer to victory than you think. Hold the line.
upright.love: A relationship tested by challenges. Past wounds making trust difficult. Perseverance needed.
upright.career: Near the finish line but exhausted. One final push will bring success. Maintain your boundaries.
upright.finance: Financial resilience — you've weathered hardship. The end is near.
upright.health: Recovery taking longer than hoped, but resilience is the key. Don't give up.

reversed.general: Giving up just before success, paranoia, or exhaustion leading to poor decisions.
reversed.love: Inability to trust again after past wounds, or giving up on a relationship prematurely.
reversed.career: Burnout causing near-miss failure. Paranoia or stubbornness creating obstacles.
reversed.finance: Giving up on a financial goal just before breakthrough.
reversed.health: Health exhaustion or giving up on a recovery plan.

upright.general: You are carrying too much. The burden is heavy — but the destination is in sight. Consider what you can put down.

upright.career: Overloaded with work, excessive responsibility, burnout approaching. Delegate or renegotiate.
upright.finance: Heavy financial burdens — debt, expenses, or financial responsibilities to others.
upright.health: Physical strain from overwork. Your body needs rest. You cannot carry this weight indefinitely.

reversed.general: Releasing burdens, delegating, or collapsing under the weight. Time to set things down.

reversed.career: Delegating responsibilities, burnout forcing a stop, or a project reaching completion.
reversed.finance: Debt relief, releasing financial burdens, or financial overload collapsing.
reversed.health: Burnout forcing necessary rest, or releasing health-related burdens.

upright.general: A messenger of creative energy and new ideas arrives. Enthusiasm and curiosity light the way. Explore freely.

upright.general: Confident, magnetic, and passionately alive. This Queen knows what she wants and inspires everyone around her.

reversed.health: Mental harshness affecting emotional and physical health.

upright.general: The highest expression of intellectual mastery — clarity, truth, authority, and justice. Command with wisdom and ethics.
upright.love: A relationship guided by mutual respect, honesty, and intellectual compatibility.
upright.career: Authoritative leadership through sharp thinking and ethical standards.
upright.finance: Rational, ethical financial leadership and decision-making.
upright.health: Using intellectual clarity to make sound, ethical health decisions.

reversed.general: Tyranny of the intellect — using thinking as a weapon, manipulation, or abuse of authority.
reversed.love: Intellectual manipulation, emotional coldness, or authoritarian behavior in a relationship.
reversed.career: Authoritarian leadership, abuse of power, or unethical use of intelligence.
reversed.finance: Manipulation or unethical financial authority.
reversed.health: Intellectual rigidity preventing holistic health approaches.

pentacles.suit_theme: material, finances, practicality, work, earth energy, the physical world

upright.general: A new material opportunity — a gift of prosperity is being offered. Take it with both hands and plant it wisely.
upright.love: A stable, secure new relationship grounded in real-world compatibility.
upright.career: A new job offer, business opportunity, or financial venture with real potential.
upright.finance: New financial opportunity or windfall. A chance to build real material security.
upright.health: New approach to physical wellness showing real, tangible results.

reversed.general: A missed opportunity, or material opportunity not taken seriously.
reversed.love: A relationship lacking material security or practical grounding.
reversed.career: A missed career opportunity, or a promising venture failing to launch.
reversed.finance: Missed financial opportunity or a promising investment not materializing.
reversed.health: New health routines not taking root. Lack of follow-through.

upright.general: Juggling multiple priorities with surprising grace. Stay flexible and keep everything in motion.
upright.love: Balancing a relationship with other life demands. Keeping romance alive amid busy schedules.
upright.career: Managing multiple work responsibilities simultaneously. Adaptability is key.
upright.finance: Balancing income and expenses carefully. Managing multiple financial priorities.
upright.health: Balancing health needs with busy life. Flexibility in health routines.

reversed.general: Dropping the balls — overwhelm, poor prioritization, or financial imbalance.
reversed.love: Relationship neglected due to inability to balance priorities.
reversed.career: Workplace overwhelm or inability to manage multiple responsibilities.
reversed.finance: Financial imbalance — spending beyond means or juggling too many obligations.
reversed.health: Health neglected due to overwhelm.

upright.general: Skilled collaboration producing something greater than individuals could alone. Mastery through teamwork.
upright.love: Building a relationship together with shared effort and mutual respect for each other's contributions.
upright.career: Excellent teamwork, apprenticeship, or skilled collaboration on a meaningful project.
upright.finance: Financial success through collaboration or skilled professional services.
upright.health: Working with a healthcare team or health community to achieve wellness goals.

reversed.general: Poor teamwork, lack of collaboration, or learning without application.
reversed.love: Relationship where partners don't work together effectively as a team.
reversed.career: Team dysfunction, workplace conflicts preventing skilled collaboration.
reversed.finance: Financial partnership that isn't working effectively.
reversed.health: Poor collaboration with healthcare providers.

upright.general: Holding tightly to what you have — for security or out of fear. Stability is valuable, but check if you're hoarding out of scarcity.
upright.love: Possessiveness or controlling behavior in a relationship. Holding too tightly to a partner.
upright.career: Job security prioritized over growth. Conservative approach to career.
upright.finance: Financial conservatism or hoarding. Security valued over growth.
upright.health: Maintaining health routines conservatively. Resistance to new health approaches.

reversed.general: Generosity breaking through hoarding, or financial instability from releasing grip too suddenly.
reversed.love: Releasing possessiveness in a relationship, or financial insecurity affecting love.
reversed.career: Releasing a secure but stagnant career, or financial instability at work.
reversed.finance: Releasing financial hoarding — generous giving or financial risk-taking.
reversed.health: Releasing rigid health routines to try new approaches.

upright.general: A time of material hardship, isolation, or lack. Help is available — look up and around you, not just down.
upright.love: Feeling left out in the cold in love, or material hardship straining a relationship.
upright.career: Job loss, financial hardship, or feeling excluded from workplace prosperity.
upright.finance: Financial loss, poverty, or significant financial hardship.
upright.health: Poor health due to material deprivation or ignoring health needs due to financial stress.

reversed.general: Recovery from hardship, receiving help, or finding spiritual resources amid material lack.
reversed.love: Relationship recovering from material hardship, or receiving love during difficult times.
reversed.career: Professional recovery after job loss or hardship.
reversed.finance: Financial recovery beginning. Receiving help or finding resources.
reversed.health: Health recovering as material situation improves.

upright.general: The flow of generosity — giving and receiving in balance. Power dynamics are present; examine them.
upright.love: Generosity and care in a relationship, though check if the giving and receiving are balanced.
upright.career: Charitable giving, mentorship, or financial generosity in professional context.
upright.finance: Generosity in flow — giving to others or receiving support.
upright.health: Receiving healing from others or generously supporting others' health.

reversed.general: Selfish giving, strings attached to generosity, or an imbalanced power dynamic in giving.
reversed.love: Imbalanced giving in a relationship — one partner gives, the other takes.
reversed.career: Charity with strings attached, or exploitation in workplace dynamics.
reversed.finance: Selfish use of wealth, or receiving charity with resentment.
reversed.health: Conditional healthcare support or exploitation of vulnerability.

upright.general: Pause to assess your progress. You've worked hard — are the results worth the continued investment? Strategic patience.
upright.love: Assessing a relationship's long-term potential. Is your investment of love and time being reciprocated?
upright.career: Evaluating career progress. Are your efforts yielding appropriate results?
upright.finance: Long-term investment assessment. Patience required — but are the returns what you expected?
upright.health: Assessing health routine effectiveness. Are your efforts producing the desired results?

reversed.general: Impatience, poor investment decisions, or effort not yielding returns.
reversed.love: Frustration at relationship progress, or effort not being reciprocated.
reversed.career: Career effort not producing results, or impatience with slow progress.
reversed.finance: Impatient investment decisions or poor return on financial effort.
reversed.health: Impatience with health progress or effort not producing expected results.

upright.general: Mastery comes through dedicated practice. You are in the apprentice phase — embrace the repetition, it builds excellence.
upright.love: Putting in the daily work to build a lasting relationship. Commitment as craft.
upright.career: Skill development, apprenticeship, or dedicated professional mastery.
upright.finance: Patient, diligent financial accumulation through skill and hard work.
upright.health: Building health through consistent daily practice. Mastery of wellness routines.

reversed.general: Poor work quality, impatience with mastery, or perfectionism stalling progress.
reversed.love: Neglecting the daily work required to maintain a relationship.
reversed.career: Poor craftsmanship, cutting corners, or perfectionism causing paralysis.
reversed.finance: Poor financial diligence or impatience with slow accumulation.
reversed.health: Inconsistent health practices or perfectionism preventing progress.

upright.general: Self-made success and the luxury of independence. You have built this — enjoy it. You don't need anyone's validation.
upright.love: A relationship entered from a place of wholeness, not need. Confident, independent love.
upright.career: Financial and professional independence achieved. Enjoying the fruits of your labor.
upright.finance: Financial abundance and self-sufficiency. A life of material comfort you've earned.
upright.health: Excellent health maintained through self-sufficient, well-resourced wellness practices.

reversed.general: Financial insecurity, dependence, or the illusion of success hiding emptiness.
reversed.love: Financial insecurity affecting relationship, or a relationship of dependence.
reversed.career: Success built on unsustainable foundations, or financial dependence in career.
reversed.finance: Financial independence undermined. Over-spending or losing self-sufficiency.
reversed.health: Neglecting health despite resources, or health spending without results.

upright.general: Generational wealth, lasting legacy, and the deep security of a life well-built. What you create will endure beyond you.
upright.love: A relationship of lasting security, commitment, and family. Building a life together that will endure.
upright.career: Long-term professional success, a family business, or work leaving a lasting legacy.
upright.finance: Generational wealth, financial security, and the achievement of long-term financial goals.
upright.health: Excellent long-term health built on strong foundations. Health as a lasting legacy.

reversed.general: Financial loss threatening legacy, family conflict over resources, or wealth that feels hollow.
reversed.love: Family conflicts affecting a relationship, or a relationship lacking long-term foundation.
reversed.career: Loss of business legacy or family business conflict.
reversed.finance: Threats to long-term financial security or family financial conflict.
reversed.health: Family health issues or long-term health being compromised by lifestyle.

upright.general: A diligent student of the material world. New opportunities to learn, earn, or create tangible results are beginning.
upright.love: A grounded, practical new romantic interest. A relationship building slowly and steadily.
upright.career: Starting a new career path with dedication and practical ambition.
upright.finance: A new financial learning opportunity. Beginning to understand money in a new way.
upright.health: Beginning a new, practical health routine with dedication and patience.

reversed.general: Lack of follow-through, materialistic without spiritual depth, or poor practical skills.
reversed.love: A relationship partner focused only on material concerns.
reversed.career: Lack of diligence, or promising career start not maintained.
reversed.finance: Poor financial habits or failure to follow through on financial plans.
reversed.health: Starting health routines without consistency.

upright.general: Slow and steady wins the race. This Knight methodically and reliably advances toward his goals. Patience and diligence prevail.
upright.love: A reliable, steady, though perhaps unexciting partner. A relationship built on dependability.
upright.career: Methodical professional progress. Reliable, efficient work that produces consistent results.
upright.finance: Conservative, methodical financial approach producing steady results.
upright.health: Consistent, methodical health routines producing steady improvement.

reversed.general: Boredom, stubbornness, or inefficiency. The knight has stopped moving.
reversed.love: Relationship stagnation, boredom, or a partner who is too conservative.
reversed.career: Workplace inefficiency, stagnation, or resistance to change.
reversed.finance: Financial stagnation or excessive conservative approach blocking growth.
reversed.health: Health routine becoming dull or ineffective due to lack of adaptation.

upright.general: A master of abundance and nurturing. She creates warmth, security, and practical comfort for all around her.
upright.love: A warm, nurturing, practical partner. A relationship grounded in real-world care and security.
upright.career: A nurturing, practical leader who creates material security for their team.
upright.finance: Abundant, practical financial wisdom. Money managed with both generosity and prudence.
upright.health: Excellent physical nurturing — good food, comfortable environment, practical self-care.

reversed.general: Financial insecurity, neglecting self-care, or materialism without heart.
reversed.love: Neglecting partner's emotional needs while focusing on material provision.
reversed.career: Financial anxiety affecting leadership, or over-focus on material security.
reversed.finance: Financial instability or neglecting material needs.
reversed.health: Neglecting physical self-care or material health needs.

upright.general: The pinnacle of material mastery — wealth, security, and generous abundance built through patience and vision.
upright.love: A stable, wealthy, and generous partner. A relationship of complete material and emotional security.
upright.career: Entrepreneurial success, financial mastery, or a powerful business leader.
upright.finance: Complete financial mastery and abundance. Wealth built through disciplined vision.
upright.health: Excellent health maintained through abundant resources and disciplined habits.

reversed.general: Materialism, stubbornness, or wealth without wisdom. Using money as control.
reversed.love: Using material wealth to control a relationship, or prioritizing money over love.
reversed.career: Authoritarian financial leadership, corruption, or materialism undermining success.
reversed.finance: Financial mismanagement or using wealth for manipulation.
reversed.health: Excessive focus on physical appearance or neglecting non-material health dimensions.
